user_story: As a Manager, I want to view candidates awaiting offer approval with their interview status and details, so that I can review candidates before approving offers
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Offer Approval screen; When the list loads; Then candidates pending offer approval are shown with all documented columns

user_story: As a Manager, I want to search candidates by name, so that I can quickly find a candidate whose offer needs approval
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Offer Approval screen; When I enter a candidate name and search; Then only matching candidates are listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to schedule mass interviews from the offer approval view, so that I can arrange additional interview rounds for multiple candidates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Offer Approval screen; When I click Schedule Mass Interviews; Then I can schedule interviews for the selected candidates

user_story: As a Manager, I want to page through the offer approval list, so that I can review all candidates across pages
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Offer Approval screen; When there are more than 10 candidates; Then pagination controls allow moving to next and last pages

user_story: As a Manager, I want to refresh the offer approval list, so that I see the latest candidates awaiting approval
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Offer Approval screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current records
